\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_list_bullet_raise\endcsname{-0.12ex}

\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_rubric_after\endcsname{12mm}

\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_spec_table_left_ratio\endcsname{0.33}

\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_subbar_arc\endcsname{0.8mm}

\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_subbar_needspace\endcsname{18mm}

% Subbar left/right padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_subbar_pad_lr\endcsname{0.8mm}

\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_subbar_pad_tb\endcsname{0.35mm}
